title: Customer Churn Dataset Investigation
description: Investigate a customer churn dataset and provide actionable business insights.
scenario: You are a data scientist at a telecom company. The business team wants to understand why customers are churning. Analyze the provided dataset summary and answer the investigation questions.
questions: What are the top 3 factors driving customer churn based on this data? Explain your reasoning.
What business recommendations would you make to reduce churn by 10%?
How would you handle the missing values in TotalCharges?
What additional data would you request to improve your analysis?
If you were to build a churn prediction model, what features would you engineer?
evaluationCriteria: Identifies contract type and tenure as key drivers

title: A/B Test Results Analysis
description: Analyze A/B test results and make a data-driven recommendation.
scenario: Your team ran an A/B test on a new checkout flow. Analyze the results and provide a recommendation.
questions: Is the result statistically significant? Should we ship the new checkout flow?
What does the segment data reveal? How does it change your recommendation?
What is the practical significance vs statistical significance here?
What risks do you see in shipping this change?
evaluationCriteria: Identifies Simpson's paradox in segment data
